model_comparison: The difference between the two models is significant and binary. Model 1 (T1) completely failed the prompt; it delivered a text about being sad in a happy, upbeat, and commercial-sounding voice, ignoring the instruction to cry. It lacked any non-linguistic vocalizations. Model 2 (T2), conversely, followed the instructions perfectly. It included a specific non-linguistic vocalization (a sob/sniff) at the beginning and maintained a believable sad and trembling timbre throughout the sentence. T2 is the only model that attempted the task.
